examples: Gastritis, duodenal ulcer and duodenitis were in the turn in younger-aged group.
Objective:To investigate extent of lesion, grading criteria of nonspecific duodenitis(NSD) and their association with duodenal ulceration.
Results Among 414 cases, there were 224 cases of superficial gastritis(54.1%), 136 cases of duodenitis(32.9%), 51 cases of peptic ulcer(12.3%), and three cases normal;
